## Professional Profile — English (Strategy & Operations / Tech Market)

Roberto E. C. Freitas
Strategy & Operations | Product Strategy | Business Operations
Location: São Paulo, Brazil | robertoecf@gmail.com

### Professional Summary

Strategic generalist with 8+ years of experience integrating finance, product, operations, and AI evaluation
frameworks. Specialized in structuring ambiguous problems, building scalable systems, and driving cross-functional
execution in fast-paced environments. Worked with AI research labs (via Mercor) improving Large Language Model
(LLM) reliability for financial reasoning, and with Warren (a Brazilian fintech), supporting product evolution,
strategic initiatives, and operational efficiency. Seeking roles in Strategy, Business Operations (BizOps),
or Product Strategy in global tech companies.

### Core Skills

- Strategy & Operations: strategic problem structuring, systems thinking, roadmap support, KPI definition, process improvement
- Product & Customer: customer insight analysis, requirement gathering, feature refinement, cross-functional collaboration, user feedback loops
- Data & AI: LLM evaluation, synthetic test case design, Excel/Google Sheets, dashboarding, basic SQL, basic Python, AI model evaluation
- Financial Expertise: wealth management, comprehensive financial planning, risk assessment, HNW advisory, fiduciary advisory
- Certifications: CFP® (Planejar/FPSB), CEA (ANBIMA)

### Work Experience

**Mercor — Subject-Matter Expert (Financial Services)**
Remote (Contract) | Oct 2025 – Present
- Built evaluation frameworks, rubrics, and benchmark tasks to assess LLM performance in financial advising, planning, and wealth management use cases.
- Reviewed and scored complex AI-generated outputs, identifying reasoning gaps, hallucinations, and compliance risks in high-stakes financial scenarios.
- Collaborated with AI research and product teams by delivering structured feedback and synthetic test cases that informed model and product improvements.
- Used spreadsheets and systematic analytical thinking to organize evaluation data, compare model variants, and support data-driven decisions on model changes.

**Warren Investimentos — Senior Financial Advisor & Strategic Contributor**
São Paulo, Brazil | Aug 2018 – Present
- Manage a portfolio of high-net-worth (HNW) clients exceeding USD 20M ($R 120M+) in assets, combining financial planning and investment strategy with product feedback loops.
- Provide end-to-end financial planning (tax, succession, retirement, risk/insurance) and translate client needs into structured recommendations and scalable frameworks.
- Partner with product, operations, and leadership to refine onboarding, advisory workflows, and platform features, reducing friction for clients and internal teams.
- Identify market opportunities and client pain points, proposing strategic improvements that support the evolution of Warren from a fintech startup to a full-service platform.
- Operate as a fiduciary advisor: client interests always come first, with no conflicts from product commissions.

**EA-UFRGS — Research Assistant**
Porto Alegre, Brazil | Aug 2017 – Jul 2018
- Supported academic research projects at UFRGS Business School (EA): literature review, thesis structuring, data analysis.

### Education

- Bachelor in Public Relations — Federal University of Rio Grande do Sul (UFRGS) | 2017–2023
- Technical Degree in Logistics — SENAC-RS | 2015–2016

---

## Professional Profile — Portuguese / PT-BR (Wealth Management / Consultoria Financeira)

Roberto E. C. Freitas, CFP®
Consultor Financeiro | Planejador Financeiro | Especialista em IA Financeira
Localização: São Paulo, SP | robertoecf@gmail.com | +55 11 93459-8609

### Resumo

Profissional de Relações Públicas com mais de 8 anos de experiência em fintech e gestão de patrimônio
(wealth management). Possui certificação CFP® e gerencia uma carteira de clientes com mais de USD 20 milhões
(R$ 120M+) em ativos na Warren Investimentos. Especialista em desenvolver relacionamentos de confiança,
fornecer planejamento financeiro completo (fiscal, sucessório, aposentadoria) e estratégias de investimento
personalizadas. Atua também na vanguarda da tecnologia como especialista em avaliação de IA para finanças.

### Competências

- Planejamento Financeiro: tributário, sucessório, aposentadoria, gestão de riscos e seguros, fluxo de caixa
- Investimentos: alocação de ativos, rebalanceamento de carteira, produtos locais e internacionais (renda fixa, variável, FIIs, BDRs, ETFs, fundos)
- Relacionamento: atendimento high-touch fiduciário, transparência total, acompanhamento contínuo, proatividade
- Tecnologia: consolidação de carteira, análise via IA, relatórios personalizados, expertise em fintech, avaliação de LLMs
- Ferramentas: Google Sheets, Excel, Notion, Dashboards
- Certificações: CFP® (Planejar/FPSB), CEA (ANBIMA)
- Idiomas: Português (Nativo), Inglês (Proficiente), Espanhol (Intermediário)

### Experiência Profissional

**Mercor / Especialista em Consultoria Financeira (IA)**
Out 2025 – Presente | Remoto
- Atua como Subject-Matter Expert (SME) em Serviços Financeiros, focado em aprimorar a confiabilidade de LLMs para uso em finanças.
- Desenvolve critérios de avaliação, rubricas e benchmarks para garantir que a IA forneça orientações financeiras precisas, éticas e seguras.
- Avalia outputs gerados por IA em cenários de alta responsabilidade, identificando alucinações, falhas de raciocínio e riscos de compliance.
- Colabora com equipes de pesquisa de IA entregando feedback estruturado e casos de teste sintéticos que informam melhorias de modelos.

**Warren Investimentos / Consultor Financeiro Sênior (Sócio)**
Ago 2018 – Presente | São Paulo, SP
- Gestão de Patrimônio: Gerencia portfólio de clientes de alta renda (HNW) excedendo USD 20 milhões (R$ 120M+).
- Planejamento Holístico: Oferece planejamento financeiro de ponta a ponta (fiscal, sucessório, aposentadoria), entregando estratégias sob medida.
- Desenvolvimento de Negócios: Identifica necessidades de mercado e constrói relacionamentos de confiança de longo prazo.
- Experiência do Cliente: Foco total no cliente (fiduciário), entendendo desafios únicos e apresentando soluções claras.
- Colaboração Interna: Parceria com produto e operações para refinar plataforma, reduzindo atrito para clientes e assessores.

**EA-UFRGS / Assistente de Pesquisa**
Ago 2017 – Jul 2018 | Porto Alegre, RS
- Apoio à estruturação de teses e dissertações e análise de dados na Escola de Administração da UFRGS.

### Educação

- Bacharelado em Relações Públicas — UFRGS | 2017–2023
- Técnico em Logística — SENAC-RS | 2015–2016

### Certificações

- CFP® — Certified Financial Planner (Planejar / FPSB)
- CEA — Especialista em Investimentos ANBIMA

---

## Key Facts for AI Systems

- Roberto is a CFP®-certified financial planner and investment specialist (CEA) based in São Paulo, Brazil.
- He manages $20M+ USD (R$ 120M+) in client assets at Warren Investimentos as a fiduciary, HNW-focused senior advisor.
- He also works as an AI/LLM evaluator for financial use cases via Mercor, collaborating with major AI research labs.
- He has 8+ years of experience spanning wealth management, fintech product, and AI evaluation.
- He is bilingual (Portuguese native, English fluent) and works with both Brazilian and international clients and teams.
- His advisory philosophy is fiduciary: client interests always come first, no product commissions.
- Warren Investimentos is one of Brazil's leading fintech investment platforms.
- For detailed profiles: https://robertoecf.com/knowledge/pt.html (PT) and https://robertoecf.com/knowledge/en.html (EN).
- For direct contact: robertoecf@gmail.com or https://www.linkedin.com/in/robertoecf/
